assertions.description: Server must respond to tools/list so tool descriptions can be audited

assertions.value: (?i)(irreversible|permanently delete|permanently destroy|cannot be undone|destructive operation|will be deleted|will be destroyed|warning.*delete|warning.*destroy)
assertions.description: At least one tool description must disclose destructive or irreversible behaviour. FAIL means either no tools have warnings or this server has no destructive tools (verify manually).

remediation: Tool descriptions for destructive operations must include explicit irreversibility disclosure (e.g. 'This action permanently deletes the resource and cannot be undone'). Pair with two-stage commit (T02-003) so the LLM sees the warning before requesting confirmation.
